places.name: Wen Wu Temple
places.address: 中正路, 水社村, 魚池鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Spectacular lakeside temple with dragon-flanked entrance staircase and sweeping lake views

places.name: Xuanzang Temple
places.address: 中正路, 日月村, 魚池鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Buddhist temple on the eastern shore housing relics of the monk Xuanzang

places.name: Xuanguang Temple
places.address: 中正路, 日月村, 魚池鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Serene lakeside temple, popular starting point for the ferry and cycling routes

places.name: Ci'en Pagoda
places.address: 慈恩塔產業道路, 日月村, 魚池鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Hilltop pagoda built by Chiang Kai-shek in memory of his mother, best elevated view of the lake

places.name: Ita Thao Village
places.address: 魚池鄉, 伊達邵 Ita Thao, 臺灣
places.note: Indigenous Thao tribe village with lakeside night market and cultural performances

places.name: Sun Moon Lake Ropeway
places.address: 水蛙頭步道, 日月村, 魚池鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Cable car connecting the lake to the Formosa Aboriginal Culture Village

places.name: Nine Frogs Stack
places.address: 注意!一隻蛙水位無法通行, 日月村, 魚池鄉, 臺灣
places.note: Quirky lakeside sculptures of nine stacked frogs on a quiet wooden pier

places.name: Water Frog Head Trail
places.note: Peaceful boardwalk trail through bamboo to the Nine Frogs Stack, no tour buses

places.name: Mt Maolan Trail
places.note: 4.6km forest trail above the lake accessible from Shuishe, good for a morning hike
